api/ACadSharp.Blocks.BlockTypeFlags.html.title: Enum BlockTypeFlags | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.Blocks.BlockTypeFlags.html.summary: Enum BlockTypeFlags Namespace ACadSharp.Blocks Assembly ACadSharp.dll Block-type flags (bit-coded values, may be combined). [Flags] public enum BlockTypeFlags Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Fields Anonymous = 1 This is an anonymous block generated by hatching, associative dimensioning, other internal operations, or an application. NonConstantAttributeDefinitions = 2 This block has non-constant attribute definitions (this bit is not set if the block has any attribute definitions that are constant, or has no attribute definitions at all). None = 0 None Referenced = 64 This definition is a referenced external reference (ignored on input). XRef = 4 This block is an external reference. XRefDependent = 16 This block is externally dependent. XRefOverlay = 8 This block is an external reference overlay. XRefResolved = 32 This is a resolved external reference, or dependent of an external reference (ignored on input).

api/ACadSharp.CadDocument.html.title: Class CadDocument | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.CadDocument.html.summary: Class CadDocument Namespace ACadSharp Assembly ACadSharp.dll Represents a CAD drawing document, providing access to all collections, tables, and configuration objects within the drawing. Supports management of entities, layers, styles, dictionaries, and other core CAD structures. public class CadDocument : IHandledCadObject Inheritance object CadDocument Implements IHandledCadObject Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Remarks The CadDocument class serves as the root container for all objects and settings in a CAD drawing. It provides methods to retrieve, configure, and manage drawing content, including entities, tables, and dictionaries. Many collections are initialized automatically, but some may be null if the corresponding dictionary entry does not exist in the root dictionary. Constructors CadDocument() Creates a document with the default objects public CadDocument() Remarks Default version AC1032 CadDocument(ACadVersion) Creates a document with the default objects and a specific version public CadDocument(ACadVersion version) Parameters version ACadVersion Version of the document Properties AppIds The collection of all registered applications in the drawing. public AppIdsTable AppIds { get; } Property Value AppIdsTable BlockRecords The collection of all block records in the drawing. public BlockRecordsTable BlockRecords { get; } Property Value BlockRecordsTable Classes Dxf classes defined in this document. public DxfClassCollection Classes { get; } Property Value DxfClassCollection Colors The collection of all book colors in the drawing. public ColorCollection Colors { get; } Property Value ColorCollection Remarks The collection is null if the AcadColor doesn't exist in the root dictionary. DictionaryVariables The collection of the system variables in the drawing. public DictionaryVariableCollection DictionaryVariables { get; } Property Value DictionaryVariableCollection Remarks The collection is null if the VariableDictionary doesn't exist in the root dictionary. DimensionStyles The collection of all dimension styles in the drawing. public DimensionStylesTable DimensionStyles { get; } Property Value DimensionStylesTable Entities Collection with all the entities in the drawing public CadObjectCollection<Entity> Entities { get; } Property Value CadObjectCollection<Entity> Groups The collection of all groups in the drawing. public GroupCollection Groups { get; } Property Value GroupCollection Remarks The collection is null if the AcadGroup doesn't exist in the root dictionary. api/ACadSharp.DwgReferenceType.html.summary: Enum DwgReferenceType Namespace ACadSharp Assembly ACadSharp.dll public enum DwgReferenceType Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Fields HardOwnership = 3 Hard ownership reference: the owner needs the owned object. The owned object cannot exist by itself. HardPointer = 5 Hard pointer reference: the referencing object needs the referenced object, but both are owned by another object. SoftOwnership = 2 Soft ownership reference: the owner does not need the owned object. The owned object cannot exist by itself. SoftPointer = 4 Soft pointer reference: the referencing object does not need the referenced object and vice versa. Undefined = 0

api/ACadSharp.DxfProperty.html.summary: Class DxfProperty Namespace ACadSharp Assembly ACadSharp.dll Represents a property of a CAD object that is associated with one or more DXF codes and provides access to its value and related metadata. public class DxfProperty : DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute> Inheritance object DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute> DxfProperty Inherited Members DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.AssignedCode DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.DxfCodes DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.ReferenceType DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.StoredValue DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.GroupCode DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>._assignedCode DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>._attributeData DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>._property DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>._storedValue DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.SetValue<TCadObject>(TCadObject, object) DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.SetValue<TCadObject>(int, TCadObject, object) DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.getCounterValue<TCadObject>(TCadObject) DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.getHandledValue<TCadObject>(TCadObject) DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.getNamedValue<TCadObject>(TCadObject) DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.GetRawValue(CadObject) DxfPropertyBase<DxfCodeValueAttribute>.getRawValue<TCadObject>(int, TCadObject) object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Remarks Use the DxfProperty class to map object properties to DXF codes for serialization or processing within DXF-based workflows. The property referenced must be decorated with the DxfCodeValueAttribute. This class supports retrieving DXF code collections, accessing property values from CAD objects, and generating extended data records for use in DXF files. Constructors DxfProperty(DxfProperty) Initializes a new instance of the DxfProperty class by copying the property information from the specified DxfProperty instance. public DxfProperty(DxfProperty value) Parameters value DxfProperty The DxfProperty instance from which to copy property information. Cannot be null. DxfProperty(int, PropertyInfo) Creates a dxf property referenced to an object property public DxfProperty(int code, PropertyInfo property) Parameters code int assigned value for this property, only useful if the property has multiple codes assigned property PropertyInfo Remarks The property must have the DxfCodeValueAttribute Exceptions ArgumentException DxfProperty(PropertyInfo) Creates a dxf property referenced to an object property public DxfProperty(PropertyInfo property) Parameters property PropertyInfo Remarks The property must have the DxfCodeValueAttribute Exceptions ArgumentException Methods GetCollectionCodes() Gets the collection of DXF codes associated with the property, if defined. public DxfCode[] GetCollectionCodes() Returns DxfCode[] An array of DxfCode values representing the collection codes for the property; or null if no collection codes are defined. Remarks Use this method to retrieve custom DXF code mappings specified by the DxfCollectionCodeValueAttribute on the property. Returns null if the attribute is not present. GetValue<TCadObject>(TCadObject) Gets the value of the specified property from the given CAD object. public object GetValue<TCadObject>(TCadObject obj) where TCadObject : CadObject Parameters obj TCadObject The CAD object instance from which to retrieve the property value. Cannot be null. Returns object The value of the property for the specified CAD object. Type Parameters TCadObject The type of CAD object from which to retrieve the property value. Must derive from CadObject. ToString() Returns a string that represents the current object. public override string ToString() Returns string A string that represents the current object. ToXDataRecords() Creates a collection of extended data records representing the current object's assigned code and stored value. public IEnumerable<ExtendedDataRecord> ToXDataRecords() Returns IEnumerable<ExtendedDataRecord> An enumerable collection of ExtendedDataRecord objects containing the assigned code and stored value. Returns an empty collection if the stored value is null. Remarks The returned collection always contains at most two records: one for the assigned code and one for the stored value, if present.

api/ACadSharp.DxfPropertyBase-1.html.summary: Class DxfPropertyBase<T> Namespace ACadSharp Assembly ACadSharp.dll public abstract class DxfPropertyBase<T> where T : Attribute, ICodeValueAttribute Type Parameters T Inheritance object DxfPropertyBase<T> Derived CadSystemVariable DxfProperty Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Constructors DxfPropertyBase(PropertyInfo) protected DxfPropertyBase(PropertyInfo property) Parameters property PropertyInfo Fields _assignedCode protected int? _assignedCode Field Value int? _attributeData protected T _attributeData Field Value T _property protected PropertyInfo _property Field Value PropertyInfo _storedValue protected object _storedValue Field Value object Properties AssignedCode Gets the code currently assigned to this instance. public int AssignedCode { get; } Property Value int Remarks If an explicit assigned code is not set, the value is determined based on the associated DXF codes. If there is exactly one DXF code, that code is returned; otherwise, an invalid code value is returned. DxfCodes Gets the collection of DXF group codes associated with the attribute data. public int[] DxfCodes { get; } Property Value int[] Remarks DXF group codes identify the type and meaning of each value in the attribute data according to the DXF specification. The order of codes in the array corresponds to the order of values in the attribute data. GroupCode Gets the group code value associated with this instance. public GroupCodeValueType GroupCode { get; } Property Value GroupCodeValueType ReferenceType Gets the type of reference associated with the attribute. public DxfReferenceType ReferenceType { get; } Property Value DxfReferenceType StoredValue Gets or sets the value associated with the current group code, using the appropriate type based on the group code definition. public object StoredValue { get; set; } Property Value object Remarks The type of the value must match the expected type for the group code as determined by the DXF specification. Assigning a value of an incorrect type will result in an exception. Supported types include string, numeric types, boolean, byte arrays, and custom handled objects, depending on the group code. When setting this property, the value is automatically converted or validated according to the group code's requirements. Constructors Arc() Default constructor. public Arc() Arc(XYZ, XYZ, XYZ) Initializes a new instance of the Arc class that passes through the specified center, start, and end points, using the default axis of rotation. public Arc(XYZ center, XYZ start, XYZ end) Parameters center XYZ The center point of the arc. start XYZ The start point of the arc. end XYZ The end point of the arc. Remarks This constructor creates an arc in the plane defined by the provided points, using the Z axis as the default normal. To specify a different axis of rotation, use the constructor that accepts an axis parameter. Arc(XYZ, XYZ, XYZ, XYZ) Initializes a new instance of the Arc class that passes through the specified start and end points, is centered at the given point, and lies in the plane defined by the specified normal vector. public Arc(XYZ center, XYZ start, XYZ end, XYZ normal) Parameters center XYZ The center point of the arc. Defines the origin of the arc's circle. start XYZ The start point of the arc. Must lie on the circle defined by the center and radius. end XYZ The end point of the arc. Must lie on the circle defined by the center and radius. normal XYZ The normal vector defining the plane in which the arc lies. Must be a non-zero vector. Remarks The arc is constructed in the plane defined by the normal vector, with its center at the specified point. The start and end points determine the angular span of the arc. The direction from start to end is determined by the order of the points and the orientation of the normal vector. Arc(XYZ, double, double, double) Initializes a new instance of the Arc class. public Arc(XYZ center, double radius, double start, double end) Parameters center XYZ radius double start double end double Properties EndAngle The end angle in radians. GetPoints(int) Retrieves the points of the specified boundary as a sequence of the specified vector type. public IEnumerable<XYZ> GetPoints(int precision = 256) Parameters precision int The number of points to generate for each arc segment. Must be equal to or greater than 2. Returns IEnumerable<XYZ> An IEnumerable<T> containing the points of the polyline, including interpolated points for arcs. UpdateEdges() Updates the collection of edges to reflect the current set of entities in the boundary definition. public void UpdateEdges() Remarks This method clears the existing edges and reconstructs them based on the current entities. It should be called after modifying the entities collection to ensure the edges remain consistent with the boundary definition. Exceptions ArgumentException Thrown if an entity in the collection is not of a supported type. Only Arc, Circle, Ellipse, Line, Polyline2D, Polyline3D, and Spline entities are allowed as hatch boundary elements.

[DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 462 })] public double ColorTint { get; set; } Property Value double Colors Colors in the gradient [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 453 })] public List<GradientColor> Colors { get; set; } Property Value List<GradientColor> Remarks 0 = Solid hatch 2 = Gradient Enabled Indicates solid hatch or gradient [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 450 })] public bool Enabled { get; set; } Property Value bool IsSingleColorGradient Records how colors were defined and is used only by dialog code [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 452 })] public bool IsSingleColorGradient { get; set; } Property Value bool Remarks 0 = Two-color gradient 1 = Single-color gradient Name Name of the gradient [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 470 })] public string Name { get; set; } Property Value string Shift Gradient definition; corresponds to the Centered option on the Gradient Tab of the Boundary Hatch and Fill dialog box. api/ACadSharp.Entities.IEntity.html.title: Interface IEntity | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.Entities.IEntity.html.summary: Interface IEntity Namespace ACadSharp.Entities Assembly ACadSharp.dll Defines the contract for a CAD entity, providing common properties and methods for graphical objects within a CAD document. public interface IEntity : IHandledCadObject, IGeometricEntity Inherited Members IHandledCadObject.Handle IGeometricEntity.ApplyTransform(Transform) IGeometricEntity.GetBoundingBox() Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Remarks The IEntity interface exposes standard attributes such as color, layer, linetype, line weight, material, and transparency, as well as methods to resolve effective property values and to match properties with another entity. Implementations are expected to represent geometric or drawable objects in a CAD environment. This interface extends IHandledCadObject and IGeometricEntity, ensuring that all entities have unique handles and geometric characteristics. Thread safety and mutability depend on the specific implementation. Properties Color The True Color object of the object. Color Color { get; set; } Property Value Color Remarks This property is used to change an object's color. Colors are identified by an AcCmColor object. This object can hold an RGB value, an ACI number (an integer from 1 to 255), or a named color. Using an RGB value, you can choose from millions of colors. Document Document where this element belongs. CadDocument Document { get; } Property Value CadDocument IsInvisible Specifies the visibility of an object or the application. bool IsInvisible { get; set; } Property Value bool Remarks If you specify an object to be invisible, it will be invisible regardless of the application visible setting. Other factors can also cause an object to be invisible; for example, an object will not be displayed if its layer is off or frozen. Layer Specifies the layer for an object. Layer Layer { get; set; } Property Value Layer LineType Linetype name (present if not BYLAYER). The special name BYBLOCK indicates a floating linetype (optional) LineType LineType { get; set; } Property Value LineType LineTypeScale Linetype scale for this entity. double LineTypeScale { get; set; } Property Value double Remarks This must be a positive, non-negative number. LineWeight Specifies the line weight of an individual object or the default line weight for the drawing. LineWeightType LineWeight { get; set; } Property Value LineWeightType Material Material object (present if not BYLAYER) Material Material { get; set; } Property Value Material Transparency Transparency value. Transparency Transparency { get; set; } Property Value Transparency Methods GetActiveColor() Get the active color for the entity, process the colors like ByBlock and ByLayer. Color GetActiveColor() Returns Color GetActiveLineType() Get the active line type for the entity, process the line types like ByBlock and ByLayer. LineType GetActiveLineType() Returns LineType GetActiveLineWeightType() Get the active line weight for the entity, process the line weights like ByBlock and ByLayer. LineWeightType GetActiveLineWeightType() Returns LineWeightType MatchProperties(IEntity) Copies matching property values from the specified entity to the current object. void MatchProperties(IEntity entity) Parameters entity IEntity The source entity whose property values will be matched and copied. Cannot be null. Remarks Only properties with matching names and compatible types are considered for copying. Properties that do not exist or are not compatible in either object are ignored.

api/ACadSharp.Entities.PolylineFlags.htm.summary: Enum PolylineFlags Namespace ACadSharp.Entities Assembly ACadSharp.dll Defines the polyline flags. [Flags] public enum PolylineFlags Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Fields ClosedPolygonMeshInN = 32 The polygon mesh is closed in the N direction. ClosedPolylineOrClosedPolygonMeshInM = 1 This is a closed polyline (or a polygon mesh closed in the M direction). ContinuousLinetypePattern = 128 The line type pattern is generated continuously around the vertexes of this polyline. CurveFit = 2 Curve-fit vertexes have been added. Default = 0 Default, open polyline. PolyfaceMesh = 64 The polyline is a polyface mesh. PolygonMesh = 16 This is a 3D polygon mesh. Polyline3D = 8 This is a 3D polyline. SplineFit = 4 Spline-fit vertexes have been added.

GetBoundingBox() Gets the bounding box aligned with the axis XYZ that occupies this entity. public override BoundingBox GetBoundingBox() Returns BoundingBox The bounding box where this entity resides. PointOnSpline(double) Calculates the point on the spline at the specified parametric position. public XYZ PointOnSpline(double t) Parameters t double The parametric position along the spline, where 0 represents the start of the spline and 1 represents the end. Must be a value between 0 and 1. Returns XYZ The point on the spline at the specified parametric position, represented as an XYZ object. Exceptions ArgumentOutOfRangeException Thrown if t is less than 0 or greater than 1. PolygonalVertexes(int) Generates a list of vertex points representing a polygonal approximation of the curve. public List<XYZ> PolygonalVertexes(int precision) Parameters precision int The number of segments used to approximate the curve. Must be equal to or greater than 2. Returns List<XYZ> A list of XYZ objects representing the vertex points of the polygonal approximation. Remarks The method calculates the vertex points by dividing the curve into segments based on the specified precision. If the curve is not closed or periodic, the last control point is explicitly added to the result. Exceptions ArgumentOutOfRangeException Thrown if precision is less than 2. TryPointOnSpline(double, out XYZ) Attempts to calculate a point on the spline at the specified parameter value. public bool TryPointOnSpline(double t, out XYZ point) Parameters t double The parameter value along the spline, typically in the range [0, 1]. point XYZ When this method returns, contains the calculated point on the spline if the operation succeeds; otherwise, NaN. This parameter is passed uninitialized. Returns bool true if the point was successfully calculated; otherwise, false. Remarks This method catches any exceptions that occur during the calculation and returns false in such cases. Ensure that the parameter t is within the valid range for the spline to avoid errors. TryPolygonalVertexes(int, out List<XYZ>) Attempts to calculate the polygonal vertexes of the current object with the specified precision. public bool TryPolygonalVertexes(int precision, out List<XYZ> points) Parameters precision int The level of precision to use when calculating the polygonal vertexes. Must be a positive integer. points List<XYZ> When this method returns, contains a list of XYZ objects representing the calculated polygonal vertexes, if the operation succeeds; otherwise, contains an empty list. Returns bool true if the polygonal vertexes were successfully calculated; otherwise, false. Remarks This method catches and suppresses any exceptions that occur during the calculation, returning false in such cases. The points parameter will always be initialized, even if the operation fails. UpdateFromFitPoints(uint) Updates the spline's control points, knots, and weights based on the current fit points and tangents. public bool UpdateFromFitPoints(uint iterationLimit = 255) Parameters iterationLimit uint The maximum number of iterations allowed for refining the tangents. Defaults to MaxValue. Returns bool true if the spline was successfully updated; otherwise, false. Remarks This method performs the following operations: Validates the spline's degree, fit points, and knot parametrization. Generates knots and control points based on the fit points and tangents. Refines the tangents iteratively if necessary, up to the specified iteration limit. Assigns uniform weights to the control points. The method returns false if the spline's degree is not 3, if there are fewer than two fit points, if the knot parametrization is set to Custom, or if tangent refinement fails.

api/ACadSharp.Extensions.PolylineExtensi.title: Class PolylineExtensions | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.Extensions.PolylineExtensi.summary: Class PolylineExtensions Namespace ACadSharp.Extensions Assembly ACadSharp.dll public static class PolylineExtensions Inheritance object PolylineExtensions Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Methods Explode(IPolyline) Explodes the polyline into a collection of entities formed by Line and Arc. public static IEnumerable<Entity> Explode(this IPolyline polyline) Parameters polyline IPolyline Returns IEnumerable<Entity> GetPoints<T>(IPolyline) Retrieves the points of the specified polyline as a sequence of the specified vector type. public static IEnumerable<T> GetPoints<T>(this IPolyline polyline) where T : IVector, new() Parameters polyline IPolyline The polyline from which to retrieve the points. Cannot be null. Returns IEnumerable<T> An IEnumerable<T> containing the points of the polyline, converted to the specified vector type. Type Parameters T The type of vector to return for each point. Must implement IVector and have a parameterless constructor. GetPoints<T>(IPolyline, int) Generates a collection of points representing the vertices of the specified polyline, including interpolated points for arcs based on the given precision. public static IEnumerable<T> GetPoints<T>(this IPolyline polyline, int precision) where T : IVector, new() Parameters polyline IPolyline The polyline from which to extract points. The polyline may contain straight segments and arcs. precision int The number of points to generate for each arc segment. Must be equal to or greater than 2. Returns IEnumerable<T> An IEnumerable<T> containing the points of the polyline, including interpolated points for arcs. Type Parameters T The type of the points to return. Must implement IVector and have a parameterless constructor. Remarks This method processes the vertices of the polyline and generates a sequence of points. For straight segments, the start and end points are included. For arc segments, additional points are interpolated based on the specified precision. If the polyline is closed, the method ensures continuity by connecting the last vertex to the first. Exceptions ArgumentOutOfRangeException Thrown if precision is less than 2.

api/ACadSharp.Header.DimensionAssociatio.title: Enum DimensionAssociation | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.Header.DimensionAssociatio.summary: Enum DimensionAssociation Namespace ACadSharp.Header Assembly ACadSharp.dll Controls the associativity of dimension objects. public enum DimensionAssociation : short Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Fields CreateAssociativeDimensions = 2 Creates associative dimension objects; the elements of the dimension are formed into a single object and one or more definition points of the dimension are coupled with association points on geometric objects CreateExplodedDimensions = 0 Creates exploded dimensions; there is no association between elements of the dimension, and the lines, arcs, arrowheads, and text of a dimension are drawn as separate objects CreateNonAssociativeDimensions = 1 Creates non-associative dimension objects; the elements of the dimension are formed into a single object, and if the definition point on the object moves, then the dimension value is updated

api/ACadSharp.Header.ObjectSnapMode.html.title: Enum ObjectSnapMode | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.Header.ObjectSnapMode.html.summary: Enum ObjectSnapMode Namespace ACadSharp.Header Assembly ACadSharp.dll Object snap mode AcDb::OsnapMask [Flags] public enum ObjectSnapMode : ushort Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Fields AllModes = EndPoint | MidPoint | Center | Node | Quadrant | Intersection | Insertion | Perpendicular | Tangent | Nearest | ClearsAllObjectSnaps | ApparentIntersection | Extension | Parallel All snapping modes on ApparentIntersection = 2048 Snap to apparent intersections in the view Center = 4 Snap to center of circles, arcs. and polyline arc segments ClearsAllObjectSnaps = 1024 Clears all object snaps EndPoint = 1 Snap to end point of lines, arcs, and to polyline vertices Extension = 4096 Snap to extensions of lines Insertion = 64 Snap to insertion points of blocks, texts, and images. Intersection = 32 Snap to intersections of any two drawing objects MidPoint = 2 Snap to mid point of lines, arcs, and polyline segments Nearest = 512 Snap to the nearest point on a drawing object Node = 8 Snap to the center of point objects None = 0 Switch off all snapping modes Parallel = 8192 Parallel lines Perpendicular = 128 Snap to points which form a perpendicular with the selected object. Quadrant = 16 Snap to circle quadrant points at 0°, 90°, 180°, and 270°. SwitchedOff = 16384 Switch off snapping Tangent = 256 Snap to tangent points

Disabled = 0 Disables SORTENTS. Plotting = 32 Sorts for plotting. Postscript = 64 Sorts for PostScript output. Redraw = 4 Sorts for redraws. Regen = 16 Sorts for REGEN commands. Selection = 1 Sorts for object selection. Slide = 8 Sorts for MSLIDE command slide creation. Snap = 2 Sorts for object snap.

api/ACadSharp.IO.CadReaderFactory.html.title: Class CadReaderFactory | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.IO.CadReaderFactory.html.summary: Class CadReaderFactory Namespace ACadSharp.IO Assembly ACadSharp.dll Provides factory methods for creating CAD file readers based on file format. public static class CadReaderFactory Inheritance object CadReaderFactory Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Remarks Use this class to obtain an appropriate ICadReader instance for supported CAD file types such as DWG and DXF. The factory selects the correct reader implementation based on the file extension. This class does not validate file existence or content; it only inspects the file extension. Methods CreateReader(string, NotificationEventHandler) Creates an ICadReader instance for the specified CAD file format. public static ICadReader CreateReader(string filename, NotificationEventHandler notification = null) Parameters filename string The path to the CAD file to read. The file extension determines the reader type. Must not be null or empty. notification NotificationEventHandler An optional event handler for receiving notifications during the reading process. Can be null if no notifications are needed. Returns ICadReader An ICadReader instance capable of reading the specified CAD file. Remarks Supported file formats include DWG and DXF. The method selects the appropriate reader based on the file extension. Exceptions NotSupportedException Thrown if the file extension is not supported. GetFileFormat(string) Determines the CAD file format based on the file extension of the specified filename. public static CadFileFormat GetFileFormat(string filename) Parameters filename string The path or name of the file whose format is to be identified. The file extension is used to determine the format. Returns CadFileFormat A value of the CadFileFormat enumeration that corresponds to the file's extension. Returns DWG for ".dwg" files, DXF for ".dxf" files, or Unknown if the extension is not recognized. Remarks The method does not validate whether the file exists or whether the file content matches the extension. Only the file extension is considered when determining the format.

api/ACadSharp.IO.CadWriterConfiguration..summary: Class CadWriterConfiguration Namespace ACadSharp.IO Assembly ACadSharp.dll Configuration for the CadWriterBase<T> class. public class CadWriterConfiguration Inheritance object CadWriterConfiguration Derived DwgWriterConfiguration DxfWriterConfiguration SvgConfiguration Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Properties CloseStream The writer will close the stream once the operation is completed. public bool CloseStream { get; set; } Property Value bool default: true ResetDxfClasses Resets the DxfClass collection in the CadDocument before writing it. public bool ResetDxfClasses { get; set; } Property Value bool default: false Remarks Sometimes the files are corrupted by badly formed dxf classes, is recommended to keep this flag set. UpdateDimensionsInBlocks Update the blocks that visualize the dimensions in the model space. public bool UpdateDimensionsInBlocks { get; set; } Property Value bool default: false Remarks When creating or modifying a dimension in a block, it needs to be updated in order to appear in the drawing. UpdateDimensionsInModel Update the blocks that visualize the dimensions in the blocks. public bool UpdateDimensionsInModel { get; set; } Property Value bool default: false Remarks The dimensions in the model space are automatically updated by the drawing software, is not recommended to update them if is not needed. WriteShapes The writer will not ignore the Shape entities in the document. public bool WriteShapes { get; set; } Property Value bool default: false Remarks Shapes can cause corruption for some documents due the lack of support for shx files in this library which cannot validate the correct shape format. WriteXData The writer will not ignore the ExtendedData collection in the CadObject. public bool WriteXData { get; set; } Property Value bool default: true WriteXRecords The writer will not ignore the XRecord objects in the document. public bool WriteXRecords { get; set; } Property Value bool default: true Remarks Due the complexity of XRecords, if this flag is set to true, it may cause a corruption of the file.

api/ACadSharp.Tables.DimensionStyle.html.summary: Class DimensionStyle Namespace ACadSharp.Tables Assembly ACadSharp.dll Represents a DimensionStyle table entry. [DxfName("DIMSTYLE")] [DxfSubClass("AcDbDimStyleTableRecord")] public class DimensionStyle : TableEntry, IHandledCadObject, INamedCadObject Inheritance object CadObject TableEntry DimensionStyle Implements IHandledCadObject INamedCadObject Inherited Members TableEntry.OnNameChanged TableEntry.Flags TableEntry.Name TableEntry.name TableEntry.ToString() CadObject.Document CadObject.ExtendedData CadObject.Handle CadObject.HasDynamicSubclass CadObject.Owner CadObject.Reactors CadObject.XDictionary CadObject.AddReactor(CadObject) CadObject.CleanReactors() CadObject.CreateExtendedDictionary() CadObject.RemoveReactor(CadObject) CadObject.updateCollection<T>(T, ICadCollection<T>) object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Extension Methods INamedCadObjectExtensions.IsValidDxfName(INamedCadObject, ACadVersion) CadObjectExtensions.CloneTyped<T>(T) LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Remarks Object name TableDimstyle Dxf class name DimensionStyle Constructors DimensionStyle(string) Default constructor. public DimensionStyle(string name) Parameters name string Name for the entry, must be unique is added to a CadDocument. Exceptions ArgumentNullException Fields DefaultName public const string DefaultName = "Standard" Field Value string StyleOverrideEntryName Represents the entry name used for style override data in the underlying storage format. public const string StyleOverrideEntryName = "DSTYLE" Field Value string Remarks This constant can be used when reading from or writing to data sources that require a specific entry name for style overrides. The value is case-sensitive. Properties AlternateDimensioningSuffix Specifies a text prefix or suffix (or both) to the alternate dimension measurement for all types of dimensions except angular (see DIMAPOST System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 4 })] public string AlternateDimensioningSuffix { get; set; } Property Value string Remarks For instance, if the current units are Architectural, AlternateUnitDimensioning is on (true), AlternateUnitScaleFactor is 25.4 (the number of millimeters per inch), AlternateUnitDecimalPlaces is 2, and AlternateDimensioningSuffix is set to "mm", a distance of 10 units would be displayed as 10"[254.00mm]. To turn off an established prefix or suffix (or both), set it to a single period (.). AlternateUnitDecimalPlaces Controls the number of decimal places in alternate units (see DIMALTD System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 171 })] public short AlternateUnitDecimalPlaces { get; set; } Property Value short Remarks If AlternateUnitDimensioning is turned on (true), AlternateUnitDecimalPlaces specifies the number of digits displayed to the right of the decimal point in the alternate measurement. AlternateUnitDimensioning Controls the display of alternate units in dimensions (see DIMALT System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 170 })] public bool AlternateUnitDimensioning { get; set; } Property Value bool true enables alternate units; false disables alternate units. AlternateUnitFormat Gets or sets the units format for alternate units of all dimension sub-styles except Angular (see DIMALTU System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 273 })] public LinearUnitFormat AlternateUnitFormat { get; set; } Property Value LinearUnitFormat AlternateUnitRounding Rounds off the alternate dimension units (see DIMALTRND System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 148 })] public double AlternateUnitRounding { get; set; } Property Value double AlternateUnitScaleFactor Controls the multiplier for alternate units (see DIMALTF System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 143 })] public double AlternateUnitScaleFactor { get; set; } Property Value double Remarks If AlternateUnitDimensioning is turned on (true), the value of this property (AlternateUnitScaleFactor) multiplies linear dimensions by a factor to produce a value in an alternate system of measurement. The initial value represents the number of millimeters in an inch. AlternateUnitToleranceDecimalPlaces Gets or sets the number of decimal places for the tolerance values in the alternate units of a dimension (see DIMALTTD System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 274 })] public short AlternateUnitToleranceDecimalPlaces { get; set; } Property Value short AlternateUnitToleranceZeroHandling Controls suppression of zeros in tolerance values (see DIMALTTZ System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 286 })] public ZeroHandling AlternateUnitToleranceZeroHandling { get; set; } Property Value ZeroHandling AlternateUnitZeroHandling Controls the suppression of zeros for alternate unit dimension values (see DIMALTZ System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 285 })] public ZeroHandling AlternateUnitZeroHandling { get; set; } Property Value ZeroHandling AngularDecimalPlaces Controls the number of precision places displayed in angular dimensions (see DIMADEC System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 179 })] public short AngularDecimalPlaces { get; set; } Property Value short -1: Angular dimensions display the number of decimal places specified by the DecimalPlaces property 0-8: Specifies the number of decimal places displayed in angular dimensions (independent of the value of the DecimalPlaces property). AngularUnit Gets or sets the units format for angular dimensions (see DIMAUNIT System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 275 })] public AngularUnitFormat AngularUnit { get; set; } Property Value AngularUnitFormat AngularZeroHandling Suppresses zeros for angular dimensions (see DIMAZIN System Variable). [DxfCodeValue(new int[] { 79 })] public AngularZeroHandling AngularZeroHandling { get; set; } Property Value AngularZeroHandling ArcLengthSymbolPosition Controls display of the arc symbol in an arc length dimension (see DIMARCSYM System Variable). If tolerances are turned on, the suffix is applied to the tolerances as well as to the main dimension. Use <> to indicate placement of the text in relation to the dimension value. api/ACadSharp.Tables.DimensionTextHorizo.title: Enum DimensionTextHorizontalAlignment | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.Tables.DimensionTextHorizo.summary: Enum DimensionTextHorizontalAlignment Namespace ACadSharp.Tables Assembly ACadSharp.dll Controls the vertical placement of dimension text in relation to the dimension line. public enum DimensionTextHorizontalAlignment : byte Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Fields Centered = 0 Centers the dimension text along the dimension line between the extension lines. Left = 1 Left-justifies the text with the first extension line along the dimension line. OverFirstExtLine = 3 Positions the text over or along the first extension line. OverSecondExtLine = 4 Positions the text over or along the second extension line. Right = 2 Right-justifies the text with the second extension line along the dimension line.

api/ACadSharp.Tables.DimensionTextVertic.title: Enum DimensionTextVerticalAlignment | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.Tables.DimensionTextVertic.summary: Enum DimensionTextVerticalAlignment Namespace ACadSharp.Tables Assembly ACadSharp.dll Controls the placement of dimension text. public enum DimensionTextVerticalAlignment Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Fields Above = 1 Places the dimension text above the dimension line except when the dimension line is not horizontal and text inside the extension lines is forced horizontal (TextInsideHorizontal = true). The distance from the dimension line to the baseline of the lowest line of text is the current DimensionLineGap value. Below = 4 Places the dimension text under the dimension line. Centered = 0 Centers the dimension text between the two parts of the dimension line. JIS = 3 Places the dimension text to conform to a Japanese Industrial Standards (JIS) representation. Outside = 2 Places the dimension text on the side of the dimension line farthest away from the first defining point.

api/ACadSharp.html.title: Namespace ACadSharp | ACadSharp
api/ACadSharp.html.summary: Namespace ACadSharp Classes CadDocument Represents a CAD drawing document, providing access to all collections, tables, and configuration objects within the drawing. Supports management of entities, layers, styles, dictionaries, and other core CAD structures. CadObject Represents an element in a CadDocument. CadObjectCollection<T> Collection formed by CadObject managed by an owner. CadSummaryInfo Holds general info and metadata about a CAD document. Like title, author, and timestamps. CadSystemVariable CadValue Represents a value entry used in CAD objects. CollectionChangedEventArgs DwgPreview Stores the thumbnail information to generate the preview for a CadDocument. DxfClassMap Represents the mapping information for a DXF class, including metadata and property mappings used for serialization and deserialization of CAD objects. DxfFileToken DxfMap DxfMapBase DxfProperty Represents a property of a CAD object that is associated with one or more DXF codes and provides access to its value and related metadata. DxfPropertyBase<T> DxfSubclassMarker GroupCodeValue OnNameChangedArgs SeqendCollection<T> Represents a collection of CadObject ended by a Seqend entity. Structs Color Represents an ACI color that also supports true color. Transparency Represents the transparency for the graphical objects. Interfaces ICadCollection<T> A collection of CAD objects. IHandledCadObject Defines a CadObject with a unique handle INamedCadObject Defines a CadObject with a unique name. IObservableCadCollection<T> Events for an observed cad collection. IProxy Represents a proxy object containing custom data. ISeqendCollection Enums ACadVersion Drawing format version. CadValueType CadValueUnitType DwgPreview.PreviewType Type of media stored in the preview. DwgReferenceType DxfCode DxfReferenceType Type of dxf reference FlowDirectionType GroupCodeValueType Group codes define the type of the associated value as an integer, a floating-point number, or a string, according to the following table of group code ranges. LineSpacingStyle LineWeightType MultiLeaderPathType Controls the way the leader is drawn. ObjectType Some object types have fixed values, this enum contains the values for these objects. OrthographicType Orthographic type RenderMode Viewport render mode TextAlignmentType TextAngleType TextAttachmentDirectionType TextAttachmentPointType TextAttachmentType Text attachment type, controls how the text label of a MultiLeader is to placed relative to the landing point.

api/CSMath.BoundingBox.html.summary: Struct BoundingBox Namespace CSMath Assembly ACadSharp.dll Bounding box representation aligned to XYZ axis. public struct BoundingBox Inherited Members ValueType.Equals(object) ValueType.GetHashCode() ValueType.ToString() object.Equals(object, object) object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Extension Methods LineExtensions.TryFindIntersection<T, R>(T, T, out R) Constructors BoundingBox(XYZ) Initializes a new instance of the BoundingBox class that represents a single point. public BoundingBox(XYZ point) Parameters point XYZ The point to use as both the minimum and maximum bounds of the bounding box. BoundingBox(XYZ, XYZ) Initializes a new instance of the BoundingBox class that represents the axis-aligned box defined by the specified minimum and maximum coordinates. public BoundingBox(XYZ min, XYZ max) Parameters min XYZ The point representing the minimum X, Y, and Z coordinates of the bounding box. max XYZ The point representing the maximum X, Y, and Z coordinates of the bounding box. Remarks If the specified minimum and maximum points are equal, the bounding box represents a single point. The constructor automatically assigns the smaller of each coordinate to Min and the larger to Max, regardless of the order of the input parameters. BoundingBox(double, double, double, double, double, double) Initializes a new instance of the BoundingBox structure using the specified minimum and maximum X, Y, and Z coordinates. public BoundingBox(double minX, double minY, double minZ, double maxX, double maxY, double maxZ) Parameters minX double The minimum X coordinate of the bounding box. minY double The minimum Y coordinate of the bounding box. minZ double The minimum Z coordinate of the bounding box. maxX double The maximum X coordinate of the bounding box. maxY double The maximum Y coordinate of the bounding box. maxZ double The maximum Z coordinate of the bounding box. Fields Infinite Instance of an infinite bounding box. public static readonly BoundingBox Infinite Field Value BoundingBox Null Instance of a null bounding box. public static readonly BoundingBox Null Field Value BoundingBox Properties Center Center of the box. public XYZ Center { get; } Property Value XYZ Extent public readonly BoundingBoxExtent Extent { get; } Property Value BoundingBoxExtent Height [Obsolete("Use LengthY instead.")] public double Height { get; } Property Value double LengthX Gets the length of the bounding box along the X-axis. public double LengthX { get; } Property Value double LengthY Gets the length of the bounding box along the Y-axis. public double LengthY { get; } Property Value double LengthZ Gets the length of the bounding box along the Z-axis. public double LengthZ { get; } Property Value double Max Get the max corner of the bounding box. public XYZ Max { readonly get; set; } Property Value XYZ Min Get the min corner of the bounding box. public XYZ Min { readonly get; set; } Property Value XYZ Width [Obsolete("Use LengthX instead.")] public double Width { get; } Property Value double Methods FromPoints(IEnumerable<XYZ>) Create a bounding box from a collection of points. public static BoundingBox FromPoints(IEnumerable<XYZ> points) Parameters points IEnumerable<XYZ> Returns BoundingBox IsIn(BoundingBox) Checks if the given box is in the bounds of this box. public bool IsIn(BoundingBox box) Parameters box BoundingBox Returns bool IsIn(BoundingBox, out bool) Checks if the given box is in the bounds of this box. public bool IsIn(BoundingBox box, out bool partialIn) Parameters box BoundingBox partialIn bool Flag to notify that on part of the box is inside but not completely. Returns bool IsIn(XYZ) Checks if the point is in the bounds of the box. public bool IsIn(XYZ point) Parameters point XYZ Returns bool Merge(BoundingBox) Merge 2 boxes into the common one. public BoundingBox Merge(BoundingBox box) Parameters box BoundingBox Returns BoundingBox The merged box. Merge(IEnumerable<BoundingBox>) Merge Multiple boxes into the common one. public static BoundingBox Merge(IEnumerable<BoundingBox> boxes) Parameters boxes IEnumerable<BoundingBox> Returns BoundingBox The merged box. Move(XYZ) Returns a new bounding box translated by the specified vector. public BoundingBox Move(XYZ xyz) Parameters xyz XYZ The vector by which to translate the bounding box. Each component is added to the corresponding coordinates of the bounding box's minimum and maximum points. Returns BoundingBox A new BoundingBox instance that is the result of translating the current bounding box by the specified vector.

api/CSMath.MathHelper.html.title: Class MathHelper | ACadSharp
api/CSMath.MathHelper.html.summary: Class MathHelper Namespace CSMath Assembly ACadSharp.dll Provides helper methods and constants for common mathematical operations, including angle conversions, floating-point comparisons, and rounding. public static class MathHelper Inheritance object MathHelper Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Remarks This static class includes constants for frequently used mathematical values and conversion factors between degrees, radians, and gradians. It also offers utility methods for comparing floating-point numbers with a configurable tolerance, normalizing angles, and rounding values. The methods are designed to address common issues with floating-point precision and angle normalization in mathematical computations. Fields DegToGradFactor Factor for converting an angle between degrees and gradians. public const double DegToGradFactor = 1.1111111111111112 Field Value double DegToRadFactor Factor for converting degrees to radians. public const double DegToRadFactor = 0.017453292519943295 Field Value double Epsilon Default tolerance public const double Epsilon = 1E-12 Field Value double GradToDegFactor Factor for converting an angle between gradians and degrees. public const double GradToDegFactor = 0.9 Field Value double GradToRadFactor Factor for converting an angle between gradians and radians. public const double GradToRadFactor = 0.015707963267948967 Field Value double HalfPI Equivalent to 90 degrees. public const double HalfPI = 1.5707963267948966 Field Value double PI Equivalent to 180 degrees. public const double PI = 3.141592653589793 Field Value double RadToDegFactor Factor for converting radians to degrees. public const double RadToDegFactor = 57.29577951308232 Field Value double RadToGradFactor Factor for converting radians to gradians. public const double RadToGradFactor = 63.66197723675813 Field Value double ThreeHalfPI Equivalent to 270 degrees. public const double ThreeHalfPI = 4.71238898038469 Field Value double TwoPI Equivalent to 360 degrees. public const double TwoPI = 6.283185307179586 Field Value double Methods Cos(double) Returns the cosine of specific angle in radians adjusting the value to 0 using Epsilon as tolerance. public static double Cos(double value) Parameters value double Returns double DegToGrad(double) Convert a value from degrees to gradian. public static double DegToGrad(double value) Parameters value double Value in degree. Returns double The gradian value. DegToRad(double) Convert a value from degree to radian public static double DegToRad(double value) Parameters value double Value in degrees Returns double The radian value FixZero(double) Returns zero if the specified number is within a small tolerance of zero; otherwise, returns the original number. public static double FixZero(double number) Parameters number double The number to evaluate for near-zero equivalence. Returns double Zero if the specified number is considered close enough to zero; otherwise, the original number. FixZero(double, double) Returns zero if the specified number is within the given threshold of zero; otherwise, returns the original number. public static double FixZero(double number, double threshold) Parameters number double The value to evaluate for near-zero equivalence. threshold double The tolerance within which the number is considered to be zero. Must be non-negative. Returns double Zero if the absolute value of the number is less than or equal to the threshold; otherwise, the original number. Remarks This method is useful for normalizing values that are very close to zero due to floating-point precision errors. It can help avoid issues where extremely small values are treated as nonzero in calculations. FixZero<T>(T) Returns a copy of the specified vector with components that are effectively zero replaced by exact zeros. public static T FixZero<T>(T vector) where T : IVector, new() Parameters vector T The vector to process. Components close to zero will be set to zero. Returns T A new vector of type T with near-zero components set to zero. Type Parameters T The type of vector. Must implement the IVector interface and have a parameterless constructor. FixZero<T>(T, double) Returns a new vector in which each component of the input vector is replaced with zero if its absolute value is less than the specified threshold. public static T FixZero<T>(T vector, double threshold) where T : IVector, new() Parameters vector T The input vector whose components are to be processed. threshold double The threshold below which a component is considered to be zero. Components with an absolute value less than this value are set to zero. Returns T A new vector of type T with components set to zero if their absolute value is less than the specified threshold; otherwise, the original component value is retained. Type Parameters T The type of vector. Must implement the IVector interface and have a parameterless constructor. Remarks This method does not modify the input vector. The returned vector is a new instance of type T. Use this method to eliminate near-zero noise in vector data. Returns bool True if its close to one or false in any other case. Remarks The returned angle is measured in the plane defined by this vector and dir, with the sign determined by the right-hand rule using normal. api/index.html.title: ACadSharp API Reference | ACadSharp
api/index.html.summary: ACadSharp API Reference Welcome to the ACadSharp API Reference. Use the navigation on the left to browse the full API documentation organized by namespace. Namespaces Namespace Description ACadSharp Core types including CadDocument, CadObject, and ACadVersion. ACadSharp.Entities Geometric entity types such as lines, arcs, polylines, text, and hatches. ACadSharp.Tables Table entry types that define reusable drawing resources: layers, block records, text styles, and more. ACadSharp.Tables.Collections Typed table collections exposed by CadDocument. ACadSharp.Objects Non-graphical CAD objects including dictionaries, layouts, groups, and image definitions. ACadSharp.Objects.Collections Typed collections for objects such as groups and image definitions. ACadSharp.IO Readers and writers for DWG and DXF file formats (DwgReader, DwgWriter, DxfReader, DxfWriter). ACadSharp.Header Strongly-typed access to DXF header system variables via CadHeader. ACadSharp.XData Extended entity data (XDATA) support for attaching application-specific data to any CadObject. ACadSharp.Attributes Attributes used to map .NET properties to DXF group codes. ACadSharp.Classes Internal DXF class registry (DxfClassCollection). See Also Overview — Introduction to ACadSharp features and usage. GitHub Repository — Source code and issue tracker. articles/samples/reading.html.title: Reading CAD Files | ACadSharp
articles/samples/reading.html.summary: Reading CAD Files ACadSharp supports reading both DWG and DXF file formats. This page shows common reading scenarios. Read a DXF File Use DxfReader to load a .dxf file into a CadDocument: using ACadSharp.IO; using (DxfReader reader = new DxfReader("path/to/file.dxf")) { CadDocument doc = reader.Read(); } Read Using the Factory If the file format is not known ahead of time, use CadReaderFactory to automatically select the correct reader based on the file extension: using ACadSharp.IO; using (ICadReader reader = CadReaderFactory.CreateReader("path/to/file.dwg")) { CadDocument doc = reader.Read(); } Supported extensions: .dwg, .dxf. Handling Notifications All readers expose an OnNotification event that reports warnings and informational messages during the reading process: using ACadSharp.IO; using (DwgReader reader = new DwgReader("path/to/file.dwg")) { reader.OnNotification += (sender, args) => { Console.WriteLine($"[{args.NotificationType}] {args.Message}"); }; CadDocument doc = reader.Read(); }

index.html.title: ACadSharp | ACadSharp
index.html.summary: ACadSharp C# library to read/write cad files like dxf/dwg. Check the documentation for specific information about the library. Features ACadSharp allows to read or create CAD files using .Net and also extract or modify existing content in the files, the main features may be listed as: Read/Write Dxf binary files Read/Write Dxf ASCII files Read Dwg files Write Dwg files Extract/Modify the geometric information from the different entities in the model Control over the table elements like Blocks, Layers and Styles, allows you to read, create or modify the different tables For pdf export check 🚧 ACadSharp.Pdf 🚧. Compatible Dwg/Dxf versions: DxfReader DxfWriter DwgReader DwgWriter AC1009 ✔️ ❌ ❌ ❌ AC1012 ✔️ ✔️ ❌ ❌ AC1014 ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ AC1015 ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ AC1018 ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ AC1021 ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ ❌ AC1024 ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ AC1027 ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ AC1032 ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ ✔️ Code Example public static void Main() { string path = "sample.dwg"; CadDocument doc = DwgReader.Read(path, onNotification); } // Process a notification from the reader private static void onNotification(object sender, NotificationEventArgs e) { Console.WriteLine(e.Message); } For more code examples check. Building Before building run: git submodule update --init --recursive This command will clone the submodules necessary to build the project.
